headline: Cummins CEO Explains How to Manage the AI Boom
summary: Cummins  —the dominant maker of diesel engine technology—finds itself, happily, caught up in the AI data-center boom.  CEO Jennifer Rumsey’s company is no stranger to boom-bust business cycles, and she says it can navigate the swings in AI demand.  Cummins’ AI-related business—supplying backup power for data centers—has sent the stock to levels not seen in a decade.

raw.headline: Cummins CEO Explains How to Manage the AI Boom

headline: Cummins Raises 2030 Financial Targets, Announces Large-engine Capacity and Product Investments
summary: COLUMBUS, Ind., May 21, 2026--At a meeting with analysts and shareholders today, members of the leadership team of Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI), shared the Company’s plans to raise its long-term financial expectations for growth and profitability, relative to its prior Analyst Day, and deliver increasing returns to shareholders.

headline: A Manufacturing Boom Is Here: Is The Driver Trump's Tariffs Or AI?
summary: US manufacturing PMI hit a 48-month high in May. But it's AI infrastructure capex, not Trump's tariffs, driving the reshoring boom.

headline: Cummins Says It Is Raising Its 2030 Financial Targets On Strong Demand, Expanded Investments, And Growth Strategy Execution
summary: Cummins is raising its 2030 financial targets as a result of disciplined investment and execution of its strategy, stronger market positions, and rising demand.Cummins is further expanding capacity and product
